text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Lately I've been dreamin' 'bout those portable
festival shrines, and I keep wakin' up kickin' the
wall!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I jolt awake and can't fall asleep again. At this
rate, I'm gonna end up puttin' a crack in the wall.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yaaawn... Wish I could just have a decent night's
sleep!
